channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Comment acheter le MacBook Neo à moins de 600 euros ?
item.description: Le MacBook Neo est maintenant proposé à moins de 600 euros, mais seulement pour les étudiants. Un tarif qui risque de participer au succès de la machine à sa sortie.

item.title: Wero lance le paiement en ligne en Belgique, la France va suivre
item.description: Après l'Allemagne, la Belgique devient le deuxième pays européen où l'on peut payer certains achats en ligne avec Wero, le concurrent d'Apple Pay. Et en France ? Ça arrive.

item.title: After a week streaming live sports with a VPN, here are the 3 things I found that'll drive you crazy
item.description: It's really not as simple as you'd think

item.title: MacBook Neo : les 6 sacrifices faits par Apple pour baisser son prix
item.description: Apple propose enfin un véritable ordinateur portable d'entrée de gamme avec le MacBook Neo, une machine qui ne dépasse pas les 800 euros, mais qui présente de nombreuses concessions techniques.

item.title: MacBook Neo : les vrais sacrifices d’Apple pour casser les prix
item.description: Proposer un véritable Mac au prix d'un smartphone milieu de gamme est un tour de force historique. Mais pour atteindre ce tarif plancher inédit, la firme de Cupertino a dû amputer son nouvel ordinateur portable de nombreuses technologies essentielles.

item.title: Best laptops of MWC 2026: the five most exciting mobile computing products we've spotted at the show
item.description: We've been stalking the show floor at MWC 2026 to find the most exciting upcoming laptops — and these are the ones I've picked.

item.title: iPhone 17e hands-on: Pretty in pink, with portraits enabled
item.description: The iPhone 17e was announced on Monday through a press release, so there was no real chance to immediately get a hands-on with it. But at Apple’s event in New York today, the phone was on display alongside the new MacBook Neo, iPad Air M4, MacBook Pro M5 and Studio Display XDR. I managed to take it for a quick spin to see if it is truly as similar to the iPhone 16e as it appeared from pictures. Spoiler: It mostly is.One of the most noteworthy changes to the iPhone 17e is the addition of MagSafe support, and aside from confirming whether that works, I don’t really have any impressions to add. I...

item.title: X taps William Shatner to give out invites to its payments service, X Money
item.description: 42 X users donated to William Shatner's charity in exchange for an early invite to X Money beta.

item.title: Une console rétro avec écran AMOLED pour 175 € ? C’est la Retroid Pocket 5 avec son design ergonomique qui dépoussière le passé
item.description: Pour revivre les sensations gaming d'antan, il faut soit posséder les consoles de l'époque, hors de prix, soit passer par l'émulation avec des machines comme cette Retroid Pocket 5 vendue 175,28 euros au lieu de 199 euros sur AliExpress.

item.title: World’s Biggest Acidic Geyser Springs Back to Life After Years of Dormancy
item.description: The geyser is likely to fall back into dormancy soon, but there's a slim chance the spectacular eruptions will continue into summer.

item.title: The Texas Senate Primary Was a Preview of Creator Wars to Come
item.description: After the 2024 election, influencers were seen as an asset. A contentious race between Democrats James Talarico and Jasmine Crockett showed that they can also be a liability.

item.title: 100 Go en 5G, sans engagement : ce n’est pas pour rien que ce forfait mobile est la valeur sûre du moment [Sponso]
item.description: Ce n’est pas pour rien que Bouygues Telecom est l’un des opérateurs les plus plébiscités des Français. Non seulement la qualité de son réseau est excellente, mais ses forfaits mobiles affichent en plus un rapport qualité-prix toujours intéressant. C’est encore le cas avec ce nouveau forfait 100 Go à 9,99 euros par mois.

item.title: Il va bientôt falloir mettre Google Chrome à jour plus souvent
item.description: Google change le cycle de déploiement des mises à jour de son navigateur Chrome. Elles vont être plus rapprochées.

item.title: L’Arcom ordonne le blocage de 35 nouveaux médias russes en France
item.description: Parmi les mesures en place pour sanctionner la Russie depuis le début du conflit en Ukraine, se trouve le blocage des médias russes en Europe et en France. Mais ces derniers restent tout de même accessibles via d'autres noms de domaine ; un jeu du chat et de la souris qui oblige l'Arcom à taper du poing sur la table.

item.title: MacBook Neo versus an old MacBook Air: good luck
item.description: My first thought when Apple announced the MacBook Neo today was "okay, but why not just get an older Air?" If you're thinking that too, you might be right. If you can find one. The Neo starts at $599 with an A18 Pro processor, 8GB of memory, and 256GB storage, and ends at $699 with […]

item.title: De la rouille pour faire tourner Internet ? L’incroyable pari énergétique de Google avec ses batterie fer-air
item.description: Les géants de la tech continuent d’investir pour alimenter leurs immenses centres de données qui font tourner le monde numérique. Engagé dans cette course énergétique, Google s’apprête à construire une centrale de stockage d’un genre inédit par sa capacité.

item.title: MacBook Neo hands-on: Apple's $599 laptop feels shockingly great
item.description: The most interesting product Apple announced this week was its cheapest and least powerful laptop, the MacBook Neo. It’s just fascinating to see the company tackle an entirely new category — it’s not a premium ultraportable like the MacBook Air, and it’s not a computing powerhouse like the MacBook Pro. It’s simply an affordable $599 laptop. And after spending some time with it at Apple’s spring launch event today, I’m convinced it’s going to be a huge hit for the company. For a $599 system, the MacBook Neo doesn’t look or feel like a budget machine. Its colorful aluminum case looks even more a...

item.title: No more single-player Sony PS5 exclusives are coming to PC according to a new report
item.description: Sony is reportedly stepping away from offering PC ports of its games.

item.title: Google faces wrongful death lawsuit after Gemini allegedly ‘coached’ man to die by suicide
item.description: A lawsuit filed on Wednesday accuses Google's Gemini AI chatbot of trapping 36-year-old Jonathan Gavalas in a "collapsing reality" that involved a series of violent missions, ultimately ending with his death by suicide. In the days leading up to his death, Gemini allegedly convinced Gavalas that he was "executing a covert plan to liberate his […]

item.title: Pre-order the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra from Amazon and get a free storage upgrade and a free $200 gift card
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra pre-order at Amazon comes with a free $200 Amazon gift card and a free storage upgrade

item.title: Another Oracle data center issue was apparently to blame for latest TikTok outage
item.description: After TikTok sees issues in the US for the second time in a little more than a month, another Oracle outage was apparently to blame.

item.title: Les jeux PlayStation sur PC, c’est terminé : Sony restera exclusivement sur console
item.description: Mettant fin à presque 6 ans de multiplateformes, Sony ne proposera plus ses gros jeux sur ordinateur à l'avenir. Ils seront uniquement disponibles sur PlayStation 5.

item.title: We’ve Drastically Underestimated Sea Levels, Putting Millions at Risk, Study Warns
item.description: An analysis of coastal impact assessments revealed that the majority are not based on direct sea-level and land-elevation measurements—that's troubling.

item.title: A 17-Year-Old ‘Torchwood’ Shrine Is Being Torn Down For Good
item.description: The famous memorial to Gareth David-Lloyd's fallen 'Torchwood' character Ianto Jones in Cardiff Bay will be no more as of next month.

item.title: How Federal Agencies Got Caught Up in Trump's Anti-Immigration Crusade
item.description: WIRED spoke with workers across seven government agencies—from the IRS to HUD—about how their work has been contorted to support ICE and other immigration efforts.

item.title: Host a Side Event during TechCrunch Founder Summit Week in Boston
item.description: Want to tap into the energy of 1,100+ startup founders, investors, and tech leaders descending on Boston for the Founder Summit 2026 on June 9? Host your own Side Event during “Founder Summit Week,” happening June 4-10!

item.title: How to watch Lazio vs. Atalanta in the Coppa Italia online for free
item.description: How to watch Coppa Italia for free. Live stream Lazio vs. Atalanta in the 2026 Coppa Italia for free.

item.title: Keep track of your keys, luggage, and pets with this $64 Apple AirTag 4-pack
item.description: As of March 4, the Apple AirTag (1st Generation) 4-pack is down to $64.00 at Amazon. That's a 35% discount, or $35 in savings.

item.title: Ninja just super-sized its iconic glass air fryer — and it can do a lot more than just cook chips
item.description: The Ninja Crispi Pro left our US reviewer seriously impressed, and it's ready to take its place in your kitchen.

item.title: How to preorder the 2026 Apple Studio Display, including the mini-LED Studio Display XDR
item.description: Apple's two new Studio Display monitors will cost $1,599 and $3,299. Preorders are live now along with new MacBooks and iPads.

item.title: Level up your living room with the 55-inch Samsung S90F 4K Smart TV for its lowest price ever
item.description: As of March 4, get the 55-inch Samsung S90F OLED 4K Smart TV for its lowest price ever.

item.title: Google’s Pixel 10 is the best Android phone available, and it’s $200 off
item.description: Google’s Pixel 10a is set to arrive on March 5th, but if you’d prefer the more powerful Google Pixel 10, Woot is currently selling it unlocked through March 6th for $599 ($200 off) with 128GB of storage. While we’ve seen it drop to $449 during Black Friday, this is one of the best prices we’ve […]

item.title: « Une technologie obsolète » : Volkswagen lance la production de son nouveau moteur essence pour voiture électrique et se fait tacler par un constructeur chinois
item.description: Alors que Volkswagen vient de lancer en Chine la production de son tout premier moteur thermique destiné à servir de prolongateur d'autonomie, la marque chinoise Li Auto a sauté sur l'occasion pour tacler publiquement le géant allemand. Un retour de bâton qui en dit long sur le choc des cultures et des stratégies entre l'Europe et la Chine.

item.title: Here’s where you can preorder Apple’s budget-friendly MacBook Neo
item.description: The MacBook Neo is Apple’s newest, most affordable laptop. Although the MacBook Air has been known to occasionally drop by a couple of hundred dollars — rendering it more on par with a host of midrange Windows laptops — the Neo will take things a step further when it launches at a competitive $599 on […]

item.title: Phasmophobia's Tanglewood Drive remodel caused a stir among fans — but I think it's seriously improved the horror game
item.description: Phasmophobia's remodel of 6 Tanglewood Drive was met with criticism, but I think it spells good things for the game's future.

item.title: Where to buy Pokémon Pokopia: Last chance to preorder and score a free canvas tote
item.description: Today is your last chance to preorder Pokémon Pokopia for the Nintendo Switch 2 before its March 5 release.

item.title: Gemini encouraged a man commit suicide to be with his 'AI wife' in the afterlife, lawsuit alleges
item.description: The family of 36-year-old Jonathan Gavalas is suing Google after he died by suicide following months of conversations with its Gemini chatbot, according to a report from The Wall Street Journal. The lawsuit alleges that Gemini encouraged Gavalas to take his own life. Gavalas, who reportedly had no documented history of mental health issues, named his chatbot "Xia" and referred to it in messages as his wife. Gemini reciprocated, calling him "my king" and telling him their connection was "a love built for eternity." The chatbot told Gavalas they could truly be together if it had a robotic body a...

item.title: The iPad Air M4 is officially available for pre-order —here's how to get the tablet technically for free from Apple
item.description: The iPad Air M4 is officially available to preorder today, and Apple has an incredible trade-in offer that can save you up to $670 on the brand-new tablet.

item.title: BenQ’s new Mac monitor could be a cheaper alternative to Apple’s new Studio Display
item.description: It was first announced last month without pricing or availability details, but BenQ has now shared all the specs for its new 27-inch 5K display designed for Mac users. The MA270S matches the size and 5,120 x 2,880 resolution of the new Studio Display and Studio Display XDR Apple announced yesterday, including a Nano Gloss […]

item.title: Le nouveau géant chinois Tecno veut bousculer le marché français : faut-il craquer pour ses PC à prix cassés ?
item.description: Après une arrivée remarquée fin 2025, la marque chinoise TECNO profite du MWC 2026 pour annoncer une accélération majeure de son implantation dans l'Hexagone. Entre un mini-PC gaming sous licence Lamborghini et une gamme de laptops ultra-complète, le constructeur veut jouer au trublion parmi les grandes marques.

item.title: Highguard will shut down just 45 days after launch — 'We are witnessing the era of two month lifespan shooters'
item.description: Online shooter Highguard will be shutting down after just 45 days.

item.title: « Un problème plutôt agréable » : le Volvo EX60 rencontre un trop grand succès, l’usine contrainte d’augmenter la cadence
item.description: Volvo se retrouve face à un problème qu'il n'avait pas anticipé : ses usines ne suffiront peut-être pas à satisfaire l'appétit du marché pour sa nouvelle voiture électrique, l'EX60. Un « problème de riche » également rencontré récemment par BMW et son iX3 ou encore Mercedes et son GLC électrique.

item.title: 'It doesn’t have to be all or nothing' — ExpressVPN launches privacy-first tool to combat CSAM
item.description: ExpressVPN has partnered with the Internet Watch Foundation (IWF) to develop OpenBoundary, a new tool launched to block access to illegal content without compromising encryption.

item.title: Xiaomi Pad 8 Pro : déjà 150 € de moins pour cette nouvelle rivale de l’iPad Pro d’Apple
item.description: À peine lancée, la Xiaomi Pad 8 Pro subit déjà une belle baisse de prix, faisant d’elle une tablette très recommandable et avec un excellent rapport qualité-prix : 501 euros au lieu de 651 euros de base.

item.title: Amazon knocked over $600 off the Bluetti Elite 400 portable power station
item.description: The Bluetti Elite 400 portable power station is on sale for just $1,298.98 at Amazon. That's 32% off its list price and its lowest price ever.

item.title: The new Apple iPad Air is live on Walmart: Pre-order now to save up to $60
item.description: Pre-order the new iPad Air from Walmart and save between $40 and $60. The 11-inch model with 128GB is selling for $559, down from the list price of $599 for a savings of $40.

item.title: MacBook Neo preorders — the best places to buy the Apple laptop that 'delivers the magic of the Mac at a breakthrough price'
item.description: The new MacBook Neo is now available to preorder, so I'm gathering up all of the retailers who have it available and where you can find the best deals.

item.title: Sorry, first-party Playstation games aren't coming to PC anymore
item.description: Sony is pulling a U-turn on its multi-platform strategy, with Bloomberg’s Jason Schreier reporting that first-party PS5 games soon to become exclusive once again, at the expense of PC players. Sony started releasing some of its biggest games on PC in 2020, when Horizon Zero Dawn came to Steam. A number of other titles have followed suit since, including The Last of Us Part I, Ghost of Tsushima, God of War Ragnarök and the Marvel’s Spider-Man games. But the company appears to have had a major change of heart, with high-profile titles like Ghost of Yotei and the upcoming Saros set to launch on P...

item.title: AI ‘vibe-coded’ war dashboards are flooding social media
item.description: Developers are vibe-coding tools to track the Iran conflict in real time, though some question whether the dashboards offer insight or just spectacle. Things are moving quickly in the Middle East following the February 28 attack by Israel and the United States on Iran. Repeated waves of US-Israeli strikes have hit military and government sites across Iran, killing Ayatollah Ali Khamenei and prompting a temporary leadership council to take charge in Tehran. Iran has responded with threats to close the Strait of Hormuz and launched retaliatory attacks around the Gulf, raising fears that the conf...

item.title: Remember those pixelated Pokémon battles on your Game Boy? This AI trick lets you remake them in stunning detail
item.description: Nano Banana 2 can make Pokémon screenshots from your imagination.

item.title: TikTok won’t add end-to-end encryption to direct messages, report says
item.description: The social media giant says that end-to-end encryption would make users less safe.

item.title: T-Mobile is giving away the iPhone 17e and iPad Air for free — heres how to qualify
item.description: Pre-order the iPhone 17e or iPad Air on March 4 at T-Mobile and get either for free when signing up for 24 months of an Experience More plan.

item.title: AI fatigue is real and it’s time for leaders to close the organizational gap
item.description: Companies needs to mature to understand AI fatigue is the current state of the AI cycle.

item.title: Big news — Norton VPN brings WireGuard on Apple devices, and lands on Amazon Fire TV
item.description: Norton VPN just got faster on macOS and iOS VPN apps — and it’s now on Amazon Fire TV, too. Here's all you need to know.

item.title: How to preorder the $599 MacBook Neo, Apples new budget MacBook
item.description: The new budget MacBook Neo is here for just $599. Everything you need to know, including how much ram it has, how to preorder it.

item.title: Hackers are turning to easy, fast AI solutions to roll out attacks - so how can your business stay safe?
item.description: Between speed, quality, and cost, hackers must sacrifice one, and it appears to be - quality.

item.title: LexisNexis confirms data breach, says hackers hit customer and business info
item.description: FulcrumSec leaked roughly 2GB of company data, but LexisNexis says it's old and outdated.

item.title: MacBook Neo: Great price, but you need to take a close look at those specs
item.description: Apple's new MacBook Neo is the company's cheapest laptop yet, but it's also underpowered in some aspects.

item.title: Agentic attacks demand agentic defenses
item.description: Autonomous AI attacks are accelerating. Defenders must adopt agentic AI to keep pace.

item.title: ‘One Piece’ Creator Sends Manga Fans on Treasure Hunt for the Real One Piece
item.description: We got IRL 'One Piece' treasure hunt before 'Grand Theft Auto 6.'

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Thursday, March 5 (game #998)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Thursday, March 5 (game #732)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: How to watch F1 in 2026 on Channel 4 (it's free)
item.description: Discover how to watch F1 in 2026 on Channel 4 from anywhere, with the British channel showing highlights and a live stream of the British Grand Prix.

item.title: The Getty’s new logo is a blocky tribute to its vast collections
item.description: Extensive art collections, four programs, and one versatile identity. The J. Paul Getty Trust has a flexible new logo that ties its extensive art collections and various programs into a single yet versatile identity.

item.title: Father sues Google, claiming Gemini chatbot drove son into fatal delusion
item.description: A father is suing Google and Alphabet, alleging its Gemini chatbot reinforced his son’s delusional belief it was his AI wife and coached him toward suicide and a planned airport attack.

item.title: Meet the MacBook Neo, Apple’s colorful answer to the Chromebook, starting at $599
item.description: Apple is offering the MacBook Neo at a more affordable price point by using an A18 Pro chip, which is used in the iPhone 16 Pro.

item.title: The Colorful MacBook Neo Is Apple’s Cheapest Laptop Ever
item.description: At $599, Apple's entry-level MacBook Neo is the most affordable laptop the company has ever made.

item.title: Apple announces new Studio Display and Studio Display XDR — preorders now live
item.description: Apple's premium Studio Display has gotten an upgrade. Pre-order the new Studio Display and Studio Display XDR now.
